india_fit.price_band_reason: Anarkali kurtis are a staple Indian silhouette easily produced at ₹399–₹1,499 with volume margins.
india_fit.climate_fit_reason: Anarkali's loose, layered cut suits monsoon and festive wear but can feel heavy in peak summer without lightweight fabric selection.
india_fit.cultural_fit_reason: Anarkali is deeply rooted in Indian aesthetic and modesty norms, widely accepted across regions and age groups.
india_fit.value_fashion_fit_reason: Anarkali kurtis are high-volume sellers in Meesho and budget chains; customers actively search and repurchase this silhouette.

claude_synthesis.convergence_summary: Anarkali kurtis show strong foundational demand (social and marketplace presence) but search interest has declined 44% over 90 days, signaling either seasonal dip, category saturation, or shift to variant keywords.
claude_synthesis.bet_reasoning: Google Trends decline from 52→29 in six weeks is a material warning despite Myntra/Meesho showing moderate results and social strength; this suggests Anarkali may be entering a consolidation phase rather than growth. Stock cautiously and focus on differentiation (embroidery, fabric weight, color novelty) rather than bulk generic Anarkali bets.
claude_synthesis.skepticism_flag: The 'strong' web-indexed social signal (10 results) is vague and may reflect seasonal festival content noise (Diwali/wedding content) rather than sustained demand trend, especially when Google Trends shows a sharper downward trajectory.
